instructions: Copy-paste each answer into Google Business Profile Q&A. Go to business.google.com → your profile → Q&A → Ask a question (post the question yourself) → then answer it. Or answer existing questions from customers.

qa_items.question: Do you clean medical offices?
qa_items.answer: Yes — TPS Pro handles medical office cleaning in Albany and throughout the Capital Region. We understand the elevated cleanliness standards required in healthcare environments, including waiting rooms, exam rooms, restrooms, and administrative areas. We use hospital-grade disinfectants on high-touch surfaces and follow OSHA guidelines for biohazard awareness. If your practice needs a reliable commercial cleaning partner who treats your space with the same precision you treat your patients, give us a call at (518) 948-7156 or request a quote at totalpropertysolution.net.

qa_items.question: Do you offer contracts for property managers?
qa_items.answer: Absolutely. TPS Pro specializes in working with property managers across Albany and the Capital Region. We offer recurring janitorial contracts for commercial properties, make-ready/turnover cleaning programs for residential portfolios, and scheduled common-area maintenance. Our contracts are flexible — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly — and we coordinate directly with your maintenance team so you're not stuck in the middle. We're used to multi-unit workflows, fast turnarounds, and the documentation property managers need. Call (518) 948-7156 or visit totalpropertysolution.net to discuss a custom plan.

qa_items.question: Are you available for same-day cleaning?
qa_items.answer: In many cases, yes. TPS Pro offers same-day and next-day availability for commercial cleaning in Albany and the surrounding Capital Region, depending on the scope of work and current schedule. We know that property managers and business owners don't always have the luxury of planning weeks ahead — a tenant moves out early, an inspection gets moved up, or a facility issue needs immediate attention. Text or call (518) 948-7156 to check our availability. We'll give you a straight answer, not a runaround.
